prompt: Update the Quick Routing section in my fastapi-pydantic SKILL.md — we've added agent integration docs to the KB since the routing was last generated. The skill covers FastAPI dependency injection, Pydantic v2 models, and PydanticAI agent patterns.

assertions.text: Output contains a '## Quick Routing' header
Output mentions replacement/update of existing section
Output includes PydanticAI-specific entries (the new content area)
